summary: Iteration 39: P3 Features Testing - ZATCA Phase 2 Compliance, i18n Translations, Mobile Nav Customization. Backend: 21/21 tests passed. Frontend: All features verified working.

issues: SAR NaN displays when no expense data - cosmetic issue only

passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/invoices/{id}/zatca-phase2 returns 200
Backend: ZATCA Phase 2 returns UUID
Backend: ZATCA Phase 2 returns xml_content
Backend: ZATCA Phase 2 XML contains all UBL elements (ProfileID, UUID, ID, IssueDate, IssueTime, InvoiceTypeCode, etc)
Backend: ZATCA Phase 2 XML contains digital signature structure (sig:UBLDocumentSignatures)
Backend: ZATCA Phase 2 returns qr_code_base64
Backend: ZATCA Phase 2 QR code has 9 TLV tags (1-9)
Backend: ZATCA Phase 2 QR Tag 1: Seller Name
Backend: ZATCA Phase 2 QR Tag 2: VAT Number
Backend: ZATCA Phase 2 QR Tag 6: XML Hash (SHA-256 base64)
Backend: POST /api/invoices/{id}/zatca-submit returns 200
Backend: ZATCA submit returns success: true
Backend: ZATCA submit returns status: ready_for_submission
Backend: ZATCA submit returns next_steps for CSID registration
Backend: ZATCA submit returns correct invoice_id
Backend: ZATCA submit returns is_b2c flag
Backend: Invalid invoice ID returns 404 on ZATCA Phase 2
Backend: Invalid invoice ID returns 404 on ZATCA submit
Backend: GET /api/partner-pl-report returns 200
Backend: Partner P&L returns company_summary or no_partners message
Backend: Partner P&L supports date range filtering
Frontend: Partner P&L Report page loads at /partner-pl-report
Frontend: Partner P&L has date range select
Frontend: Partner P&L has tabs (Partner Breakdown, Expense Categories, Payment Modes)
Frontend: Partner P&L has summary cards (Revenue, Expenses, Net Profit, Partners)
Frontend: CCTV Security page loads at /cctv
Frontend: Language switching works (EN ↔ AR)
Frontend: RTL mode activates with Arabic language
Frontend: Mobile bottom navigation shows 5 items + More button
Frontend: Mobile nav customize modal opens
Frontend: Mobile nav customize modal shows 12 options
Frontend: Mobile nav customize modal has Reset to Default button
Frontend: CCTV option available in mobile nav customization
i18n: CCTV translations exist in EN, AR, UR, HI
i18n: Partner P&L translations exist in EN, AR, UR, HI
i18n: ZATCA Phase 2 translations exist in EN, AR, UR, HI
i18n: Mobile Navigation translations exist in EN, AR, UR, HI (customize_nav, reset_default, select_items, more)
critical_code_review_comments: ZATCA Phase 2 Service (zatca_phase2.py): UBL 2.1 compliant XML generation with all required elements
ZATCA Phase 2 Service: 9-tag TLV QR code encoding (seller, VAT, timestamp, total, VAT amount, hash, signature placeholder, public key placeholder, CSID placeholder)
ZATCA Phase 2 Service: Invoice hash uses SHA-256 base64 encoding
ZATCA Phase 2 Service: Signature fields use PLACEHOLDER values since actual signing requires ZATCA CSID registration
i18n (i18n.js): All 4 languages (EN, AR, UR, HI) have translations for CCTV, Partner P&L, ZATCA Phase 2, Mobile Nav keys
Mobile Nav Customization (DashboardLayout.jsx): 12 options available (Home, Sales, Expenses, Stock, Reports, Customers, Employees, Branches, Analytics, CCTV, Credits, Settings)
Mobile Nav Customization: Uses localStorage 'ssc_bottom_nav' for persistence, allows up to 5 items
Minor: Partner P&L Report page shows English titles even in Arabic mode - translations exist but not used in page component

mocked_apis.ZATCA digital signature: Uses PLACEHOLDER_SIGNATURE - actual signing requires ZATCA CSID registration
mocked_apis.ZATCA public key: Uses PLACEHOLDER_PUBLIC_KEY - requires CSID from ZATCA
mocked_apis.ZATCA CSID stamp: Uses PLACEHOLDER_CSID - requires registration on ZATCA Fatoora Portal

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 39 tested ZATCA Phase 2 Compliance features. APIs: GET /api/invoices/{id}/zatca-phase2 generates UBL 2.1 compliant XML invoice with UUID, digital signature structure, and 9-tag TLV QR code. POST /api/invoices/{id}/zatca-submit prepares invoice for ZATCA submission with status 'ready_for_submission'. QR code tags: 1=Seller, 2=VAT, 3=Timestamp, 4=Total, 5=VAT Amount, 6=Hash, 7-9=Placeholders for signature/key/CSID. i18n translations verified for CCTV, Partner P&L, ZATCA Phase 2, Mobile Nav in EN/AR/UR/HI. Mobile nav customization: 12 options, select up to 5, persisted to localStorage.
